headline: Is Copper Leverage And Policy Support Altering The Investment Case For Freeport-McMoRan (FCX)?
summary: In recent days, Freeport-McMoRan has drawn attention as investors reacted to its strong leverage to high copper prices, progress at the Grasberg underground ramp-up, and supportive US policy for copper producers. An interesting angle is how Freeport-McMoRan’s control of most US refined copper supply, combined with its Indonesian developments, ties policy, pricing, and long-term resource access into a single copper-focused story. We’ll now examine how Freeport-McMoRan’s leverage to elevated...
